description.zh: 一场不许碰球的冰球赛！球是磁铁，你手里也是磁铁：翻面用吸力拉、斥力推，隔空把球送进球门。戴上磁场眼镜，看不见的磁力线第一次现出原形。
description.en: Ice hockey where touching the puck is forbidden! The puck is a magnet and so is yours: flip N/S to pull or push it into the goal from a distance. Put on field goggles and see invisible field lines come alive.
